rulings.Case Title: 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 9, 2017, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT DIVISADERO PLACE HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, KATE KARDOS, STEVEN POLEVOI, MERCEDES MILLER, NICOLE MELET, STONE MELET's DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION (Second Cause of Action only). The second cause of action for declaratory relief is stayed pending the resolution of the writ. Defendants shall file a responsive pleading, including a demurrer if necessary and/or proper, within 10 days of the notice of entry of order re: writ. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 9, 2017, 2016 line 1. PETITIONER 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, DANIEL MULDERRY, GAYLEN MULDERRY, PETER DUBOIS, LESLIE ZIMMERMAN, HENRIETTA HAGOPIAN DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION sustained with 40 day leave to amend. Intervenor shall allege (1) that a compliant Request for Resolution has been served; Ex. H does not satisfy the requirements of CC 5935 and Intervenor fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a compilation of communications sent at different times constitutes "a Request for Resolution" per CC 5935; or (2) to serve a compliant Request for Resolution. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Further Instructions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 9, 2017, 2016 line 2. OTHER GREGORY (RECEIVER) STERLING's Motion For Further Instructions The Court concurs with Petitioner's opposition to Receiver's Request as follows: (1) The Court affirms its 7/6/16 Order; and (2) adopts answers to the Receiver's questions on pages 1 and 2 of opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WESSAM REFAT VS. THE MOSSER COMPANIES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 9, 2017, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC.'s, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. Moving party fails to present any facts or law for the proposition that the payment due under the Agreement was subject to set-offs or deductions; or that a motion for summary judgment may be granted on the basis of lack of damages due to a payment made where the payment is made 6 months after the filing of the complaint and 3 days before the filing of the motion for summary judgment. = (501/REQ)
